title: Full Turtle Armor
description: Completes the turtle armor set. Forge & Fabric
body:
Completes the turtle armor set. Forge & Fabric

Don't be limited to a single helmet.


The Turtle Armor


Shell Effects (Configurable) ---- Each shell applies provides amounts of additional water breathing Turtle Shell Chestplate: +15 Seconds of Water Breathing Turtle Shell Leggings: +15 Seconds of Water Breathing Turtle Shell Boots: +10 Seconds of Water Breathing

 This can all be applied on top of the vanilla turtle helmet, which adds +10 seconds of water breathing.
Full Set Effects (Configurable) ---- + 50 Seconds of Water Breathing + While submerged, Night Vision is granted + While submerged, Dolphin's Grace is granted
